intended_use: The prolaio eVO2peak Module (Version 1.0) is an all-software medical device intended to be used for estimating peak oxygen consumption (eVO2peak (mL/kg/min)) in adult patients for whom such VO2 Peak c
intended_use_full: The prolaio eVO2peak Module (Version 1.0) is an all-software medical device intended to be used for estimating peak oxygen consumption (eVO2peak (mL/kg/min)) in adult patients for whom such VO2 Peak cardiopulmonary functional testing is desired. The prolaio eVO2peak Module uses as inputs: demographic data and single-lead electrocardiogram (sampled at least 125 Hz) and triaxial accelerometry data (sampled at 50 Hz) from qualified third-party FDA-cleared wearable medical sensors from patients carrying out activities of daily living. The prolaio eVO2peak Module is intended to provide information as an adjunctive aid in the clinical evaluation of patients by qualified clinicians who have the responsibility for interpreting its significance in connection with other standard of care clinical findings.
target_condition: Cardiopulmonary functional assessment; determination of peak oxygen consumption capacity
ground_truth: Cardiopulmonary exercise test (CPET) reference VO2 Peak measurements
other_metrics: Mean Error (Bias) Overall: 1.47 mL/kg/min [95% CI: 0.55-2.27]; Mean Absolute Error Overall: 4.39 mL/kg/min [95% CI: 3.82-4.91]; Mean Error (Bias) Bike Modality: 0.97 mL/kg/min [95% CI: 0.01-1.96]; Mean Absolute Error Bike Modality: 4.07 mL/kg/min [95% CI: 3.52-4.69]
